sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n43978" key="eu)qhgh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὐθηγής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n43978.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sharpening well,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.63</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Damoch.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
